skills.name: link-headers
skills.description: Add Link response headers to your homepage for agent discovery per RFC 8288 and RFC 9727.

skills.name: dns-aid
skills.description: Publish DNS for AI Discovery (DNS-AID) records for DNS-based agent discovery.

skills.name: markdown-negotiation
skills.description: Return HTML responses as markdown when agents request it via Accept: text/markdown.

skills.name: api-catalog
skills.description: Publish an API catalog for automated API discovery per RFC 9727.

skills.name: oauth-discovery
skills.description: Publish OAuth/OIDC discovery metadata so agents can authenticate with your APIs.

skills.name: oauth-protected-resource
skills.description: Publish OAuth Protected Resource Metadata so agents can discover how to authenticate.

skills.name: auth-md
skills.description: Publish Auth.md metadata for agent registration.

skills.name: mcp-server-card
skills.description: Publish an MCP Server Card for agent discovery per SEP-1649.

skills.name: agent-skills
skills.description: Publish an agent skills discovery index per the Agent Skills Discovery RFC v0.2.0.

skills.name: webmcp
skills.description: Support WebMCP to expose site tools to AI agents via the browser.
